reason: User confirmed our OAuth token is stuck on the Spark-Ad shadow copies for the foreseeable future (pending Creative/Audience/Pixel Management scopes). Map each shadow ad_id to the short label shown in Ads Manager. 9 entries covering Lookalike-Rejected adgroup (legacy POV/Bank-rejected/Wait) + MS+SS Customer reject-Narrow adgroup (new 4 ads + 2 earlier same-day additions).
implication: Pairings inferred from caption content (PMAL UGC / Cashback Launch / Cashback - $50 Don't Know / Cashback - Already Borrowing). User will spot any mismatches and correct on next daily.

reason: CTR-drop + fatigue thresholds don't fire meaningfully with <1 week of history; the new-ad (<3d) signal was just repeating user actions. Removing the Signals section and the _detect_signals helper to keep the daily Telegram post focused on actual performance data.
implication: Revive once the account has 2-3 weeks of history and the thresholds have signal to give.

reason: parse_mode=HTML caused Telegram to 400 on literal '<' chars in the signals block and ad captions. Our messages don't use any HTML formatting, so no parse_mode is the safe default.
implication: Future ad captions containing < / > / & ship unescaped without problems.

reason: TikTok's /report/integrated/get/ silently drops rows for ads whose secondary_status=AD_STATUS_DELETE, wiping historical conversions the moment an ad is removed. POV's 3 conversions on 2026-04-21 disappeared from the daily total the moment POV was deleted mid-2026-04-22.
implication: fetch_snapshot() now unions new rows with prior on-disk snapshot metrics; new wins on collision, old spend>0 rows are preserved. Once captured for a day, metrics stay. Bootstrapped POV's 2026-04-21 row from commit 85d673c.

reason: Default primary_status=STATUS_NOT_DELETE hid ads the Ads Manager UI was showing. Pass STATUS_ALL explicitly; also capture secondary_status field.
implication: Full roster visible (deleted + pending + delivering). Does not resolve the token-scope issue that blocks direct-ad ad_ids — those remain (not returned) even with STATUS_ALL.

reason: Auto-add newly generated assets toggle caused each ad to split into hook/CTA/music variant ad_ids. Disabling so each user-facing ad maps 1:1 to a single ad_id going forward.
implication: Creative Variants section will auto-hide as historical variants churn. ad_name from /ad/get/ becomes the single source of truth for labels.

reason: Old caption-named ads (POV / Bank-rejected / Wait) were Spark Ads; their ad_name defaults to the originating organic post caption. Mapping captions to fabricated labels in the registry conflated organic post identity with ad identity. Going forward we trust /ad/get/ ad_name directly; registry remains available as an optional manual override but is empty by default.
implication: Old Spark Ads render with truncated captions until they churn. New direct-to-Ads-Manager ads render with the short name the user typed.

notes: 4 new ads launched pending TikTok review: PMAL UGC (1863143710471201), Cashback Launch (1863143710471217), Cashback - $50 Don't Know (1863143710471169), Cashback - Already Borrowing (1863143710471185). All 'Your own content / TikTok account' sourced.

entity_name: POV: The bank just rejected your loan and you don't know what to do

metrics_at_decision.note: 2-day-old creative with strongest early CPA (W16 ranking #1) before removal

reason: TikTok /adgroup/update/ rejects placement changes on Smart+ adgroups (error 40002: 'This API does not support Upgraded Smart Plus ads.')
implication: Pangle exclusion on Smart+ can only be done via Ads Manager UI, not API. Workflow now classifies this as skipped rather than failed.

notes: Two new adgroups planned under the existing campaign. First carries the 2 remaining current ads (Cashback, Bank-rejected) plus a Spark Ad from a scheduled organic post. Second is Custom Audience direct from rejected list.
First snapshots committed: daily 2026-04-20, weekly 2026-W16, monthly 2026-03. Metrics expansion (reach, frequency, engagement, hook retention) live.
